candidates.title: Partiful is turning party invites into a payments business - Startup Fortune
candidates.highlight: # Partiful is turning party invites into a payments business [...] Partiful has launched built-in ticketing in the U.S., letting hosts sell paid event tickets directly inside the app. The move turns a viral invite tool into a payments business and puts it closer to Eventbrite at the casual end of paid events. [...] Par
